ARI.notes: Hazen came from Red Sox front office. Stable regime. Rebhan promoted internally.

ATL.notes: Anthopoulos came from Dodgers (originally Blue Jays). Shah promoted internally.

BAL.notes: Elias came from Astros scouting. Brad Ciolek left for Nationals in Oct 2023, Robertson took over in Nov 2025.

BOS.notes: Breslow from Cubs. Devin Pearson was SD but left for Nationals in Oct 2025. Bruml promoted internally.

CHC.notes: Hoyer promoted internally after Theo Epstein left. Kantrovitz from Athletics. Carter Hawkins is GM (from Guardians).

CHW.notes: Getz promoted internally after Rick Hahn fired. Shirley retained from prior regime.

CIN.notes: Krall promoted internally. Katuska promoted internally.

CLE.notes: Antonetti (PBO) and Mike Chernoff (GM) long-tenured. Purser replaced Barnsby in 2024, came from Rays pipeline.

COL.notes: DePodesta hired Nov 2025 after 43-119 season. Josh Byrnes is GM (from Dodgers). Montgomery is longtime Rockies career scout retained by new regime. DePodesta's pipeline runs through Mets and Dodgers.

DET.notes: Harris from Giants (originally Cubs). Jeff Greenberg is GM (also from Cubs). Conner from Padres.

HOU.notes: Brown from Braves scouting. Ladnier came from Diamondbacks as Senior Director of Amateur Scouting.

KC.notes: Picollo promoted internally. Bridges from Giants/Braves pipeline.

LAA.notes: Minasian fired 2026-06-27; Mozeliak (STL 2007-25) interim while GM search runs. McIlvaine from Brewers.

LAD.notes: Friedman from Rays. Brandon Gomes is EVP & GM. Fitzpatrick holds Director of Amateur Scouting title. Billy Gasparino is VP of Baseball Ops, David Finley is VP of Scouting (broader roles).

MIA.notes: Bendix from Rays. Gabe Kapler promoted to GM Nov 2025. Rachel Balkovec (from Yankees) as Dir of Player Dev. Piliere from Mariners.

MIL.notes: Arnold promoted internally after David Stearns left for Mets. Long-tenured SD.

MIN.notes: Derek Falvey departed Jan 2026. Zoll (previously GM) now running baseball operations. Johnson is long-tenured SD.

NYM.notes: Stearns from Brewers. Brought Eduardo Brizuela from MIL. Gross from Astros. Most complete organizational transplant among post-2023 hires.

NYY.notes: Longest-tenured GM in baseball. Oppenheimer has been SD since 2005. Full org history IS regime history.

ATH.notes: Long-tenured front office. Kubota has been with Athletics since 2002.

PHI.notes: Dombrowski formerly ran Red Sox, Tigers, Marlins. Preston Mattingly is GM (2024). Barber from Yankees.

PIT.notes: Cherington from Blue Jays/Red Sox. Justin Horowitz left for Washington. SD role folded into AGM Kevan Graves's portfolio — structural experiment.

SD.notes: Preller from Rangers scouting. Long-tenured. Kemp promoted internally.

SEA.notes: Dipoto long-tenured. Justin Hollander is EVP & GM (2022). Hunter from Mets.

SF.notes: Posey replaced Farhan Zaidi. Zero FO experience but surrounded himself with Bobby Evans, Randy Winn, Dusty Baker. Zack Minasian is GM (from Brewers). Tony Vitello hired as manager directly from college (Tennessee).

STL.notes: Bloom from Red Sox (originally Rays). Randy Flores moved to expanded AGM role, Mortimer promoted to run drafts (Feb 2026). Bloom traded Arenado, Gray, Contreras to amass prospect capital.

TB.notes: Premier executive incubator. Hamilton Marx elevated to VP/AGM overseeing amateur scouting (Oct 2025) but Ricci retains formal SD title. Lost Bendix to Marlins.

TEX.notes: Young from MLB Commissioner's Office. Ross Fenstermaker is GM (2024). Fagg is longest-tenured SD in baseball.

TOR.notes: Atkins from Cleveland. Shane Farrell departed for Detroit in late 2024. Tramuta came from Mets.

WSH.notes: Toboni (age 35, youngest PBO in baseball) from Red Sox where he was amateur SD. Ani Kilambi is GM (age 31, from Phillies/Rays). Eddie Longosz not retained. McGowan from Mets/Yankees pipeline. Complete modernization of the organization.
